summary: Trade Signal module testing completed successfully. All 24 backend tests passed (16 TradeSignal tests + 8 regression tests). Frontend UI verified showing correct direction badge (LONG/SHORT/NO TRADE), confidence percentage, entry zones, stop loss, targets, risk/reward ratio, warnings, Signal Reasoning and Factor Breakdown sections.
passed_tests: /api/trade-signal returns valid TradeSignal with all 14 required fields
TradeSignal direction is valid (LONG/SHORT/NO TRADE)
Confidence is within valid range 0-100
Factors structure contains all 7 intelligence components
market_bias factor includes bias and confidence
liquidity factor includes direction and imbalance_ratio
exchange_consensus factor includes description and score
funding_rate factor includes rate and sentiment
open_interest factor includes total, trend, and change_24h
patterns factor includes count and top_pattern
whale_alerts factor includes count
Entry zone, stop loss, and targets are valid for LONG/SHORT signals
Risk/Reward ratio is numeric
Reasoning explanation is detailed (>50 chars)
Warnings is a list
Timestamp and valid_for fields present
REGRESSION: /api/market/bias returns valid response with exchange_consensus
REGRESSION: /api/market/bias inputs structure contains all scoring components
REGRESSION: /api/liquidity returns valid response with clusters, direction, exchange_stats
REGRESSION: Liquidity clusters have required fields
REGRESSION: Liquidity direction structure has required fields
UI: TradeSignalCard displays on dashboard with data-testid='trade-signal-card'
UI: Direction badge (LONG/SHORT/NO TRADE) visible with correct styling
UI: Confidence percentage displayed with progress bar
UI: Entry Zone, Stop Loss, Target 1, Target 2 displayed correctly
UI: Risk/Reward Ratio displayed with color coding
UI: Warnings displayed with yellow alert styling
UI: Invalidation reason displayed
UI: Show Details expands to show Signal Reasoning section
UI: Factor Breakdown shows all 7 factors with score bars
UI: Refresh button triggers signal update
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Signal module fully functional. Signal direction can change between LONG, SHORT, and NO TRADE based on live market conditions - this is expected. Factor scores range from -12 to +12 with thresholds at +/-4 for trade signals. All 7 factors (market_bias, liquidity, exchange_consensus, funding_rate, open_interest, patterns, whale_alerts) are being synthesized correctly. UI displays all trade parameters (entry zone, stop loss, targets, R/R ratio) with proper formatting and color coding.

trade_signal_endpoint.direction: LONG/SHORT/NO TRADE based on market conditions
